quote_last: ," said Thump, and without warning he sat up.
title: Cordelia Underwood: Or the Marvelous Beginnings of the Moosepath League
author: Van Reid

quote_last: , a voice from loudspeakers was caroming around, scrambling the names of towns the next bus out would stop at.
title: The Little Dog Laughed
author: Joseph Hansen
